# jurisd command reference

This reference is generated from the command contract registry.

Supported completion shells: `bash`, `zsh`, `fish`.

## `bibliography`

Render a bibliography from cached citations.

- Command id: `cite.bibliography`
- Group: `cite`
- Side effect: `local_metadata_read`
- Stability: `stable`
- MCP tool: `bibliography`
- TUI: not enabled
- Result contract: `cite.bibliography.v1`

Usage:

```bash
jurisd bibliography
```

Arguments:

- none

Flags:

- `--op` (string): Bibliography operation.
- `--query` (string): Cached citation lookup query.
- `--cite-key` (string): Cached citation key.
- `--document` (string): Logical document name.
- `--format` (string): Output format.
- `--output-path` (string): BibLaTeX output path.

Examples:

- `jurisd bibliography`

## `cache-cited-by`

Cache cited-by information for a citation key.

- Command id: `cite.cacheCitedBy`
- Group: `cite`
- Side effect: `network_read`
- Stability: `stable`
- MCP tool: `cache_cited_by`
- TUI: not enabled
- Result contract: `cite.cacheCitedBy.v1`

Usage:

```bash
jurisd cache-cited-by mabo-1992-hca-23
```

Arguments:

- `citeKey`: citeKey argument.

Flags:

- none

Examples:

- `jurisd cache-cited-by mabo-1992-hca-23`

## `cite`

Create or record a citation cache entry.

- Command id: `cite.create`
- Group: `cite`
- Side effect: `local_metadata_read`
- Stability: `stable`
- MCP tool: `cite`
- TUI: not enabled
- Result contract: `cite.create.v1`

Usage:

```bash
jurisd cite 'Mabo v Queensland (No 2)' --year 1992
```

Arguments:

- `title`: title argument.

Flags:

- `--year` (number): year value.
- `--footnote-number` (number): footnoteNumber value.
- `--keywords` (array): keywords values.
- `--action` (string): Citation cache action.
- `--neutral-citation` (string): Neutral citation.
- `--reported-citation` (string): Reported citation.
- `--url` (string): Primary source URL.
- `--type` (string): Source type.
- `--jurisdiction` (string): Jurisdiction code.
- `--court` (string): Court code.
- `--summary` (string): Brief source summary.
- `--document` (string): Logical document name.
- `--pinpoint` (string): Pinpoint reference.
- `--style` (string): Citation style.
- `--cite-key` (string): Cached citation key.

Examples:

- `jurisd cite 'Mabo v Queensland (No 2)' --year 1992`

## `fetch-document-text`

Fetch full text for a source document.

- Command id: `source.fetchDocument`
- Group: `source`
- Side effect: `network_read`
- Stability: `stable`
- MCP tool: `fetch_document_text`
- TUI: not enabled
- Result contract: `source.fetchDocument.v1`

Usage:

```bash
jurisd fetch-document-text <url>
```

Arguments:

- `url`: url argument.

Flags:

- `--format` (string): Output format.
- `--cite-key` (string): Existing citation cache key to associate with fetched source metadata.

Examples:

- `jurisd fetch-document-text <url>`

## `fetch-module`

- MCP tool: not exposed
- TUI: not enabled
- Result contract: `modules.fetch.v1`

Usage:

```bash
jurisd fetch-module <name> [--manifest-url URL] [--modules-dir DIR]
```

Arguments:

- `name`: name argument.

Flags:

- `--manifest-url` (string): Override manifest URL.
- `--modules-dir` (string): Override modules directory.

Examples:

- `jurisd fetch-module <name> [--manifest-url URL] [--modules-dir DIR]`

## `find-citing`

Find locally indexed items citing or considering a target.

- Command id: `graph.findCiting`
- Group: `graph`
- Side effect: `local_metadata_read`
- Stability: `stable`
- MCP tool: `find_citing`
- TUI: `Find locally indexed items citing or considering a target` (local/read-only)
- Result contract: `graph.findCiting.v1`

Usage:

```bash
jurisd find-citing '[1992] HCA 23' --kinds cites,considers
```

Arguments:

- `target`: target argument.

Flags:

- `--limit` (number): limit value.
- `--kinds` (array): kinds values.
- `--module` (string): Pinned data module name.
- `--format` (string): Output format.

Examples:

- `jurisd find-citing '[1992] HCA 23' --kinds cites,considers`

## `format-citation`

Format an AGLC4 citation.

- Command id: `cite.format`
- Group: `cite`
- Side effect: `read_only_query`
- Stability: `stable`
- MCP tool: `format_citation`
- TUI: `Format an AGLC4 citation` (local/read-only; TUI mode=pinpoint fetches the supplied URL and requires --confirm-network-read.)
- Result contract: `cite.format.v1`

Usage:

```bash
jurisd format-citation 'Mabo v Queensland (No 2)' --neutral-citation '[1992] HCA 23'
```

Arguments:

- `title`: title argument.

Flags:

- `--footnote-ref` (number): footnoteRef value.
- `--pinpoint-para` (number): pinpointPara value.
- `--pinpoint-page` (number): pinpointPage value.
- `--paragraph-number` (number): paragraphNumber value.
- `--mode` (string): Citation mode.
- `--neutral-citation` (string): Neutral citation.
- `--reported-citation` (string): Reported citation.
- `--pinpoint` (string): Pinpoint reference.
- `--style` (string): Citation style.
- `--url` (string): AustLII document URL for pinpoint mode.
- `--phrase` (string): Phrase to locate for pinpoint mode.
- `--case-citation` (string): Case citation prefix for pinpoint mode.

Examples:

- `jurisd format-citation 'Mabo v Queensland (No 2)' --neutral-citation '[1992] HCA 23'`

- `--citation` (string): Neutral citation for by=citation lookups.

## `search-cases`

Search Australian and New Zealand case law.

- Command id: `search.cases`
- Group: `search`
- Side effect: `network_read`
- Stability: `stable`
- MCP tool: `search_cases`
- TUI: `Search cases` (accepted web-read default)
- Result contract: `legal_search_results.v1`

Usage:

```bash
jurisd search-cases <query> [--jurisdiction cth] [--limit 10]
```

Arguments:

- `query`: Search query.

Flags:

- `--jurisdiction` (string): Jurisdiction code.
- `--limit` (number): Maximum result count.
- `--offset` (number): Pagination offset.
- `--format` (string): Output format.
- `--sort-by` (string): Sort mode.
- `--method` (string): Search method.

Examples:

- `jurisd search-cases "native title" --jurisdiction cth --limit 5`

## `semantic-search-local`

Run local semantic search over installed data modules.

- Command id: `search.semanticLocal`
- Group: `search`
- Side effect: `local_metadata_read`
- Stability: `stable`
- MCP tool: `semantic_search_local`
- TUI: `Run local semantic search over installed data modules` (local/read-only)
- Result contract: `search.semanticLocal.v1`

Usage:

```bash
jurisd semantic-search-local 'restraint of trade' --k 5
```

Arguments:

- `query`: query argument.

Flags:

- `--k` (number): k value.
- `--module` (string): Pinned data module name.
- `--filter-jurisdiction` (string): Jurisdiction facet filter.
- `--filter-type` (string): Document type facet filter.
- `--filter-segment-type` (string): Segment type facet filter.
- `--format` (string): Output format.

Examples:

- `jurisd semantic-search-local 'restraint of trade' --k 5`
